meaning: n.掠夺兵,暴兵,海盗vi.掠夺,阻饶议事vt.阻碍议案通过
examples: Senator Seymour has threatened a filibuster to block the bill.
They simply threatened to filibuster until the Senate adjourns.
A group of senators plans to filibuster a measure that would permit drilling in Alaska.
There's one group of fiscal conservatives nearly enough to sustain a filibuster of the spending bill.
So we'll have to see what the Senate actually does, whether Republicans filibuster this bill.
